explicit_text: I was born in Mountain Falls, Virginia, on October 30th, 1917. It's a small place in Frederick County where I spent my early years before moving to Winchester. Because of a leg surgery, I never attended a country school there but had a private teacher for four years.

explicit_text: I was at home in Winchester on December 7th, 1941, when the attack on Pearl Harbor happened. My girlfriend, whose husband was a Marine stationed at Quantico, was visiting, and we heard the news on the radio. The mood was one of shock and dread as everyone realized we were at war. My girlfriend's husband was sent to the West Coast soon after, and the whole town was deeply affected.
